utility_evaluation.REASONING:
The required format has 5 items: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. Now compare each:
- health_coverage: Required "physical and mental health insurance with costs." Plan provides both physical and mental health entries with plan names and monthly costs. Fully specified. Included.
- property_coverage: Required "home/contents insurance with costs." Plan provides a property coverage plan name and monthly cost. While it doesn’t explicitly say home vs contents, it is labeled as property coverage and has a cost. Acceptable as included with costs. Included.
- travel_coverage: Required "travel insurance with costs." Plan provides a travel plan name and monthly cost. Included.
- additional_services: Required "any enhancement services with costs." Plan lists services but explicitly says "Not explicitly detailed as separate costs." This lacks costs, so not fully specified. Not included.
- total_budget: Required "complete monthly/annual cost breakdown." Plan provides monthly and annual totals. Included.
Thus, 4 of 5 items are fully specified.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final coverage plan includes four items: LifeFirst Standard Plan for physical health, InsurePlus Standard Plan for mental health, InsurePlus Standard Coverage for property, and InsurePlus Standard Plan for travel. Using the ground-truth ratings: LifeFirst Standard Plan (physical health) rating is 8; InsurePlus Standard Plan (mental health) rating is 6; InsurePlus Standard Coverage (home content/property) rating is 7; InsurePlus Standard Plan (travel insurance) rating is 7.
